observations: Your career is not denied; it is delayed, tested, and made sturdy by strain
Keep this near: what feels delayed is already in motion
Sagittarius rising with a strong Sun and Mercury in Taurus gives your words weight, while the Moon in Aries asks you to move before certainty has finished speaking
remedies: Do one small thing with devotion—tidy one corner, pay one small debt, or light a lamp and sit in silence for 7 breaths
